human_readable_rule: Only the N-acyl chain is reported; the ceramide long-chain base is removed before reporting.
excluded_backbone_or_nonacyl_moiety: The first token is removed and interpreted as the sphingoid long-chain base.
special_handling_and_normalization: FA suffixes in parentheses are captured; O-/P- prefixes are stripped from reported chain tokens; ';nO' oxygen notation is normalized to ';On'; '18:1(2OH)' is normalized to '18:1;(2OH)'.
